description_long: This object consists of two lush, conical evergreen Christmas trees standing side by side. The tree on the left is a deep green with dense, layered branches, while the tree on the right is similarly shaped but dusted with a realistic layer of white snow on its branches, giving it a wintry appearance. Both trees have natural, needle-like foliage and lack any visible decorative ornaments, string lights, or toppers. The trunks are short and mostly hidden by the thick lower branches. The snow-covered tree's branches appear slightly heavier and more drooped due to the weight of the snow. The overall look is naturalistic, evoking a festive, outdoor holiday scene suitable for urban parks or public spaces.
description: A pair of realistic evergreen Christmas trees, one with dense green foliage and the other dusted with snow, both lacking visible decorations or toppers.
description_view_0: Front view showing both trees side by side, with the left tree fully green and the right tree covered in snow.
description_view_1: Angled view from behind, highlighting the snow-covered tree in the foreground and the green tree partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view with the snow-covered tree on the left and the green tree on the right, both showing dense, layered branches.
description_view_3: Angled rear view with the green tree in the foreground and the snow-covered tree behind, emphasizing the fullness of the branches.
